title: LMNT Speech Synthesis Request
description: Schema for a text-to-speech synthesis request to the LMNT Speech API.

voice.description: The ID of the voice to use for synthesis. Use the voices endpoint to list available voices.

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech.

sample_rate.description: Sample rate of the output audio in Hz.

speed.description: Speaking speed multiplier. 1.0 is normal speed.

temperature.description: Expressiveness of the synthesized speech. Higher values produce more expressive output.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag for the synthesis language. LMNT supports 31 languages.

return_timestamps.description: If true, the response includes word-level timestamps.

conversational.description: If true, optimizes for conversational speech patterns.

model.description: The LMNT model to use for synthesis. Defaults to the latest Blizzard model.
